title: orobus pisiformis
intro: Orobus pisiformis, also known as the kidney vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which aid in treating urinary tract issues and kidney stones. The health benefits of Orobus pisiformis include relieving symptoms of kidney stones, reducing fever, and treating various types of infections. The herbal preparations of Orobus pisiformis typically involve drying the plant material to create tea, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
